plugins.name: slack-monitor
plugins.description: Scan Slack for unanswered DMs, @mentions, and thread replies. Drafts context-aware replies and asks permission before sending.

plugins.name: tickler
plugins.description: Watch GitHub PRs, issues, and Jira tickets for state changes. Notifies when a watched item meets its condition.
